data.text/markdown:
Narrative layer

Semantic search + topic clustering over persisted post embeddings (paraphrase-multilingual-mpnet-base-v2, handles English / Swahili / Sheng). Run embed_new to cover the full corpus before reading topics - clusters sharpen with more data.

data.text/html: <marimo-ui-element object-id='vblA-0' random-id='1695a7f2-ef2b-73ed-b04d-65dc78680a92'><marimo-text data-initial-value='"IEBC cannot be trusted, the election will be rigged"' data-label='"\u003cspan class=\"markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"paragraph\"\u003eSemantic search\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e"' data-placeholder='""' data-kind='"text"' data-full-width='true' data-disabled='false' data-debounce='true'></marimo-text></marimo-ui-element>

<marimo-ui-element object-id='bkHC-0' random-id='46f8a43a-4d32-8165-2804-2fc5fc12e42e'><marimo-table data-initial-value='[]' data-label='null' data-data='"[{\"sim\":0.7611449360847473,\"author_handle\":\"kiprotich26kco\",\"text\":\"@citizentvkenya Something is wrong with our electoral system. Bribery &amp; theft in broad day. I visited https://t.co/taip3AdyrL to check my details on to be shut out. I don't trust iebc at all. Not even their election results. https://t.co/UyT4nl76V6\"},{\"sim\":0.7406249046325684,\"author_handle\":\"SamuelKisika\",\"text\":\"As Kenya gears up to August 2027 general election, it's now clear the current electoral commission @IEBCKenya under the chairmanship of @EEEthekon is the most incompetent polls body when it can't enforce Elections Laws on voter bribery in a parliamentary by-election.@NelsonHavi\"},{\"sim\":0.7208913564682007,\"author_handle\":\"IEBCKenya\",\"text\":\"Press Release: \\nClaims by Persons Purporting to Stage Election Manipulation in the 2027 General Election\\n\\nIEBC notes with grave concern recent utterances by certain political actors alleging that they will influence the electoral process in the 2027 presidential election through extra- legal mechanisms. \\n\\nThese utterances, which have elicited considerable disquiet within the electoral environment, pose a real risk of distorting public perception of Kenya\\u2019s democratic processes. IEBC considers such utterances to be unacceptable, reckless, and entirely baseless. \\n\\nThe utterances are clearly intended to instill fear, mislead the public and erode confidence in the integrity of the electoral system. IEBC therefore, urges all Kenyans to disregard, dissociate and refrain from amplifying them.\\n\\nDownload: https://t.co/le42ZZIgHv\\n#16thJulyByelection  #YourVoteYourFuture   #TalkWithIEBC   #StopFakeNews\"},{\"sim\":0.7132401466369629,\"author_handle\":\"illosokuan\",\"text\":\"If the reports from Ol Kalou are true, then voter bribery is illegal and a serious attack on democracy. The IEBC must act decisively and hold everyone accountable. No political party should be above the law. #OlKalou #StopVoterBribery #ProtectDemocracy #KenyaPolitics\"},{\"sim\":0.6905847787857056,\"author_handle\":\"Dr_AustinOmondi\",\"text\":\"There has never been a rigged election in Kenya. To suggest that someone can subvert the will of Kenyans by rigging is unbelievable. We meet at the ballot in 2027.\"},{\"sim\":0.6899867653846741,\"author_handle\":\"JohnWangigi1\",\"text\":\"@IEBCKenya Is this not voter bribery? This is what erodes Kenyan trust on you. if you can't manage  a credible by-election, what of a general election? @MarthaKarua @OkiyaOmtatah @LawSocietyofKe @skmusyoka @citizentvkenya\"},{\"sim\":0.6854814291000366,\"author_handle\":\"BundiKirianki\",\"text\":\"@mwabilimwagodi2 Collude with IEBC to inflate voter register by including underages,foreigners and dead-voters. Shut off the media. Shut off network. We are doomed\"},{\"sim\":0.6852655410766602,\"author_handle\":\"MigunaMiguna\",\"text\":\"Zero legislative record. Zero oversight. Zero vision. Zero ideology. Just PR.\\n\\nBut the compromised Infotrak keeps trying to manufacture fake polls as part of the overall strategy of keeping the politics of Kenya an organized BANDITRY! It won\\u2019t work this time! https://t.co/T2EZbemrr3\"},{\"sim\":0.6787127256393433,\"author_handle\":\"RefariiHen\",\"text\":\"@HonMoses_Kuria This is voter bribery. IEBC should take action\"},{\"sim\":0.6623153686523438,\"author_handle\":\"ouma_neko\",\"text\":\"The 2027 elections will not be free, fair, transparent, credible, or verifiable. \\n\\nRuto is scared, and many fear he could rig the election and even declare a state of emergency. https://t.co/RDbTBoLJ9W\"}]"' data-total-rows='12' data-total-columns='3' data-max-columns='50' data-banner-text='""' data-pagination='true' data-page-size='10' data-field-types='[["sim",["number","float32"]],["author_handle",["string","str"]],["text",["string","str"]]]' data-show-filters='true' data-show-download='true' data-show-search='true' data-show-column-summaries='true' data-show-data-types='true' data-show-page-size-selector='true' data-show-column-explorer='true' data-show-chart-builder='true' data-row-headers='[]' data-hidden-columns='[]' data-has-stable-row-id='false' data-lazy='false' data-preload='false'></marimo-table></marimo-ui-element>
